parameters.subject: =Critical issue logged: {{$json.issue_title}}

parameters.query:
SELECT
  i.*,
  i.id            AS issue_id,
  i.title         AS issue_title,
  i.priority      AS issue_priority,
  i.created_at    AS issue_created_at,

  pm.id           AS project_id,
  pm.title        AS project_title,

  -- project manager
  pm_owner.email  AS project_manager_email,
  pm_owner.firstname    AS project_manager_firstname,
  pm_owner.lastname     AS project_manager_lastname

FROM issues i

JOIN project_managements pm
  ON pm.id = i.project_management_id

JOIN spree_users pm_owner
  ON pm_owner.id = pm.owner_id

WHERE
  i.created_at >= UTC_TIMESTAMP() - INTERVAL 160 MINUTE
  AND LOWER(i.priority) IN ('high', 'urgent');

mySql.name: New FM UAT Task Management Database
